diffs.diff:
--- a/_inspect2.py
+++ b/_inspect2.py
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+import sys, os

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import inspect

+

+print('=== TSR.render source ===')

+try:

+    src = inspect.getsource(TSR.render)

+    print(src)

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Could not get source: {e}')

+

+print('\n=== Loading model ===')

+model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')

+model.to('cuda')

+model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)

+

+print('\n=== Renderer type ===')

+print(type(model.renderer))

+print('\n=== Renderer methods ===')

+print([m for m in dir(model.renderer) if not m.startswith('_')])

+print('\n=== Renderer._forward source ===')

+try:

+    src = inspect.getsource(model.renderer._forward)

+    print(src)

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Could not get source: {e}')

+

+print('\n=== Checking if renderer has get_camera_rays ===')

+if hasattr(model.renderer, 'get_rays'):

+    print('get_rays found')

+    print(inspect.getsource(model.renderer.get_rays))

+else:

+    print('No get_rays')
